purpose: Record non-results, blocked claims, weaker-than-baseline outcomes, and explicit no-claim zones.
principle: A negative result is not a failure. It is a boundary condition for honest science.

items.statement: Existing real-data comparisons do not currently justify a claim that RLL beats LCDM or CPL/w0waCDM.
items.evidence_status: repository history and bootstrap status indicate cosmology_background remains blocked for full covariance-aware comparison
items.blocked_claim: RLL is superior to LCDM/CPL on real cosmological data
items.next_test: joint covariance-aware likelihood with BAO, H(z), Pantheon+, Planck/CMB, f_sigma8 and AIC/AICc/BIC

items.statement: Mass-gap and high-mass neutron-star seeds are not enough to classify compact objects without posterior samples and EOS/baseline comparison.
items.evidence_status: seed-level JSON artifacts exist; raw posterior samples and baseline comparison remain required
items.blocked_claim: RLL predicts or proves a new compact-remnant transition

items.statement: Dark-lens and dormant-BH seeds are not proof of a new dark compact mass population without astrometric, photometric, RV, and alternative-model comparisons.
items.evidence_status: external-only seeds and v0 artifact exist
items.blocked_claim: RLL validates a new dark-lens or wandering-BH population

items.statement: Residual structure route is mapped but not yet supported by a mature validator or raw stream data.
items.blocked_claim: RLL validates residual gravitational structures or orphan-halo signatures
items.next_test: stream membership probability with Gaia/stream data

items.statement: Slingshot seeds do not yet compute traceback probabilities with a Galactic/LMC potential model.
items.evidence_status: seed route and v0 artifact exist; raw kinematics and potential models remain required
items.blocked_claim: an object preserves a validated RLL-style gravitational impulse memory
items.next_test: traceback_probability with Gaia astrometry, RV, and potential models

items.statement: High-z SMBH calculations are simplified seed-level growth estimates without raw photometry/spectroscopy, magnification context, and host-galaxy constraints.
items.evidence_status: seed calculations exist; raw JWST/Chandra context remains required
items.blocked_claim: RLL explains early SMBH formation better than standard seed models
items.next_test: Eddington growth grid with light/heavy/direct-collapse baselines and uncertainties

items.statement: Orbital-shape-angular-momentum v1 computes reference-parameter metrics but does not ingest raw ephemeris vectors or compare to SPICE/JPL/N-body/J2 baselines.
items.evidence_status: CI artifact exists with Earth, Moon, Mars, Jupiter seed metrics
items.blocked_claim: the route proves a new gravity, new deformation law, or RLL superiority over celestial mechanics
items.next_test: state-vector h comparison and shape-gravity residual against baseline models

items.statement: Any H0 solution sitting on a scan boundary must be treated as a grid artifact until a corrected interval or optimizer shows an internal best point.
items.evidence_status: h0_grid_expansion manifest and runner now exist; actual corrected-run artifact is still required
items.blocked_claim: H0 boundary value is a physical RLL result

items.statement: RLL-to-w0wa effective mapping is a coordinate diagnostic, not a likelihood comparison or evidence calculation.
items.evidence_status: mapper script now exists; real-data contours and likelihood artifacts remain required
items.blocked_claim: RLL explains or beats CPL solely from w0_eff/wa_eff proximity

items.statement: Growth/f_sigma8 must not be used as strong evidence while CLASS/CAMB or an explicitly declared approximation backend is missing.
items.evidence_status: internal kernel exists, but backend_status must be recorded in every growth artifact
items.blocked_claim: RLL is validated by f_sigma8 or solves S8 tension
items.next_test: record backend_status and compare against LCDM with the same backend

safe_conclusion: The project explicitly records where it cannot claim victory. This protects future scientific value.
